'''''Kouerd 1''''' was a [[IPV-1 System Patrol Craft]] employed to protect [[Harlequin Station]].

The ''Kouerd 1'' was apparently bought off by [[K'Armyn Viraxo]] in order to give his [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] in the [[Pursuer-class enforcement ship|''Pursuer''-class enforcement ships]] ''[[Enkidu]]'' and ''[[Gilgam]]'' an unchallenged assault on Harlequin Station.

Luckily for Harlequin Station, [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] was on hand to defend the station once the cowardly crew of the ''Kouerd 1'' abandoned their duties and fled.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
